introSection: Abismo is a Maurer Rides SkyLoop XT 450 roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.
fullText:
Abismo is a Maurer Rides SkyLoop XT 450 roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.

Orange track and black supports.



Abismo is Spanish for "Abyss".
